title: Combined ENSO and PCM burden figure
caption: This figure links the annual mean ONI classification with the annual number of probable acute/subacute PCM records and the annual national incidence. Bars are colored by ENSO phase, making it possible to compare PCM burden across El Niño, La Niña, and Neutral years.

title: Incidence rate ratios for continuous ONI models
caption: This figure summarizes exploratory regression estimates for the association between annual mean ONI and national PCM incidence using current and lagged ONI variables.

title: Incidence rate ratios for ENSO phase models
caption: This figure summarizes exploratory regression estimates comparing El Niño and La Niña years with Neutral years.

title: Municipal annualized incidence, 1998-2024
caption: This map shows the annualized municipal incidence of probable acute/subacute PCM for the full analytical period. Incidence is expressed per 100,000 person-years.

title: Municipal annualized incidence by period
caption: This panel compares annualized municipal incidence across the four analytical subperiods. The same color scale is used across panels to support visual comparison.
